title: Inbound Create{Note}: parse Note, store in remote_posts, create notifications
description:
Handle Create{Note} from verified remote actor. Parse the Note object: extract content_html (sanitize with ammonia), spoiler_text, visibility (from to/cc fields), sensitive, language, in_reply_to, tags (Mention and Hashtag), attachments. Store in remote_posts. Create notification rows for mentioned local actors. Handle Create{Question} by treating as Note without poll.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to collect Create{Note} fixtures from mastodon.social, Misskey, GoToSocial, Akkoma and document structural differences. Spawn a testing subagent to write parse tests for each fixture. Spawn a third subagent to implement notification creation.

**Test discipline**:
- Parse mastodon.social Create{Note} fixture → verify all fields extracted correctly
- Parse Misskey Note (different structure) → verify graceful handling
- Parse Create{Question} → stored as Note, poll fields ignored without error
- Parse Note with Mention tags → verify mention notifications created for local actors
- Parse Note with Hashtag tags → stored for hashtag timeline queries
- Parse Note with in_reply_to referencing unknown post → stored with in_reply_to_uri set, no error
All fixtures captured from real servers. Never use implementation as its own oracle. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests — never mock.

**Defensive programming**:
- ammonia sanitize content_html BEFORE storage — never store unsanitized remote HTML
- Handle missing fields gracefully: if content is missing, use empty string
- content_html length limit: truncate at 100KB maximum to prevent DB bloat
- Reject activities from actors on suspended domains before any processing
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors are Result<T, AppError>
- Log at ERROR/WARN level — never include token values or private keys
acceptance_criteria: mastodon.social Create Note parsed and stored; Misskey Note structure handled; mentions create notifications; HTML sanitized with ammonia before storage; suspended domain actors rejected; unknown in_reply_to stored without error
